# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file that defines a preprocessor macro named `OVERRIDDEN_DEFINE` with a value of `1`. The macro can be used throughout the program to conditionally compile code or to replace occurrences of `OVERRIDDEN_DEFINE` with the value `1` during preprocessing.
